proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a, b)
int_mod_rel(n, a, b) = a.congr_mod(b, n)
int_mod_rel(n, a, b) = a.congr_mod(b, n)
int_mod_rel(Nat.0, a, b) != a.congr_mod(b, Nat.0)
int_mod_rel(n, a, 0) != a.congr_mod(0, n)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) or is_reflexive[T0](x0) }[Int](int_mod_rel(n))

function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { lib(set).equivalence_class[T0](x0, x1) != lib(set).equivalence_class[T0](x0, x2) or not lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) or x0(x1, x2) }[Int](int_mod_rel(n), a, a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a, a)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) or lib(relation_basic).is_partial_equivalence[T0](x0) }[Int](int_mod_rel(n))
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_basic).is_partial_equivalence[T0](x0) or is_symmetric[T0](x0) }[Int](int_mod_rel(n))
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not is_symmetric[T0](x0) or not x0(x1, x2) or x0(x2, x1) }[Int](int_mod_rel(n), a, b)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a, b)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, b, a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a, b)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, b, c)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_basic).is_equivalence[T0](x0) or lib(relation_basic).is_partial_equivalence[T0](x0) }[Int](int_mod_rel(n))
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { not lib(relation_basic).is_partial_equivalence[T0](x0) or is_transitive[T0](x0) }[Int](int_mod_rel(n))
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not is_transitive[T0](x0) or not x0(x1, x2) or not x0(x2, x3) or x0(x1, x3) }[Int](int_mod_rel(n), a, b, c)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a, c)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a, c)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, b, d)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a + b, c + d)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a, c)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, b, d)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) = x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, a * b, c * d)
function(x0: Int, x1: Int, x2: Nat) { not x0.congr_mod(x1, x2) or int_mod_rel(x2, x0, x1) }(a, b, n)
not int_mod_rel(n, a, b)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Int, x2: Int) { not int_mod_rel(x0, x1, x2) or x1.congr_mod(x2, x0) }(n, -a, -b)
int_mod_rel(n, -a, -b)
function(x0: Int, x1: Nat) { x0.congr_mod(x0, x1) }(c, n)
not c.congr_mod(c, n) or not a.congr_mod(b, n)
function(x0: Int, x1: Nat) { x0.congr_mod(x0, x1) }(c, n)
not c.congr_mod(c, n) or not a.congr_mod(b, n)
function(x0: Int, x1: Nat) { x0.congr_mod(x0, x1) }(c, n)
not c.congr_mod(c, n) or not a.congr_mod(b, n)
function(x0: Int, x1: Nat) { x0.congr_mod(x0, x1) }(c, n)
not c.congr_mod(c, n) or not a.congr_mod(b, n)
